did_you_know.title: Thurgood Marshall Nominated to Supreme Court
did_you_know.text: President Lyndon B. Johnson nominated Thurgood Marshall to the U.S. Supreme Court, making him the first African American Justice in the nation's history.

did_you_know.title: Preston Brooks Attacks Charles Sumner on Senate Floor
did_you_know.text: South Carolina congressman Preston Brooks savagely beat anti-slavery Senator Charles Sumner with a cane on the Senate floor — a moment that crystallized the brutal reality of pro-slavery politics.
